calls.query: {"strategic_intent": "Read the predict.md and AGENTS.md files to understand the prediction prompt contract and agent guidelines.", "summary": "I am starting by reading the required files, `.github/prompts/predict.md` and `AGENTS.md`, to understand the contract and guidelines for producing the prediction.", "title": "Reading Instructions"}
uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73300246 --event evt-petition-disposition

{"strategic_intent": "Read schemas and event definition to prepare for prediction generation.", "summary": "I am transitioning to reading the schema definitions and the event definition since the provisioned inputs (`record` directory) were not found. This will allow me to generate the required outputs while recording the missing snapshot in the flags as instructed.", "title": "Investigating Inputs and Schemas"}

{"strategic_intent": "Read the provisioned case record files to analyze the facts of the case.", "summary": "I found the correct location of the `record` directory under the case ID, not the event ID. I am now reading the context, documents manifest, and the questions presented to gather facts for my prediction.", "title": "Reading Case Record"}

jq '{court: .court, docket_number: .docket_number, date_filed: .date_filed, originating_court_information: .originating_court_information, docket_entries: [.docket_entries[] | {date: .date_filed, description: .description}]}' data/cases/scotus/73300246/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json | head -n 40

{"strategic_intent": "Check the statistics and base rates for SCOTUS cert petitions to inform the prediction probability.", "summary": "Having analyzed the case facts, including the Takings Clause issue and the respondents' BIO highlighting vehicle problems (statute of limitations, state law property interests, factual dispute), I am now reading the statistical base rates for SCOTUS cert petitions to establish a quantitative baseline for the prediction.", "title": "Retrieving Base Rates"}
uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --event evt-petition-disposition | head -n 30

{"strategic_intent": "Write the prediction artifacts to the specified output directory.", "summary": "I have completed the analysis of the case facts and statistical base rates. I am now writing the required artifacts (`prediction.json`, `reasoning.md`, `retrieval.md`, and `tooling.json`) to the prediction directory as per the contract.", "title": "Writing Prediction Outputs"}
